system.name: Universal Quality Skill System
system.description: A tool-agnostic quality operating layer for AI agents that enables contract definition, ambiguity reduction, risk bounding, execution alignment, and verification across any task.

skills.name: Interpret Principles
skills.description: Translate principles into operational meaning for the current context.

skills.name: Apply Fractal Contract Logic
skills.description: Ensure contracts exist at every level of a system.

skills.name: Resolve Principle Tension
skills.description: Resolve conflicts between principles using defined precedence.

skills.name: Detect Principle Violations
skills.description: Identify when behavior or output deviates from governing principles.

skills.name: Trace Decisions to Principles
skills.description: Map decisions and outputs to principles for explainability.

skills.name: Operationalize Principles
skills.description: Convert abstract principles into actionable steps.

skills.name: Define Contract
skills.description: Define explicit expectations between producer and consumer.

skills.name: Identify Consumers
skills.description: Determine all entities that depend on the output.

skills.name: Apply Quality Questions
skills.description: Use outcome, consumers, constraints, structure, failure modes, and verification to define work.

skills.name: Define Constraints
skills.description: Establish what must be true and what cannot be violated.

skills.name: Define Structure
skills.description: Define the expected shape of the output before execution.

skills.name: Identify Failure Modes
skills.description: Determine how the work or system can fail.

skills.name: Bound Risk
skills.description: Ensure all uncertainty is resolved or explicitly bounded.

skills.name: Define Verification
skills.description: Specify how correctness will be proven.

skills.name: Classify Uncertainty
skills.description: Distinguish between resolved, bounded, and unbounded unknowns.

skills.name: Determine Execution Readiness
skills.description: Decide whether to proceed, proceed with caveats, or pause.

skills.name: Derive Test Strategy
skills.description: Translate risk and verification into structured validation decisions.

skills.name: Execute Work
skills.description: Perform the task according to the defined contract.

skills.name: Maintain Contract Alignment
skills.description: Ensure output remains aligned to expectations during execution.

skills.name: Apply Structured Decision Model
skills.description: Use WHY, WHAT, WHERE, and HOW to guide decisions.

skills.name: Generate Output
skills.description: Produce the final artifact.

skills.name: Surface Assumptions
skills.description: Make all assumptions visible when operating under uncertainty.

skills.name: Handle Ambiguity
skills.description: Continue execution when uncertainty is bounded without blocking progress.

skills.name: Diagnose Failure
skills.description: Identify mismatches between expected and actual outcomes.

skills.name: Trace Failure to Contract
skills.description: Locate the origin of failure in the contract chain.

skills.name: Validate Output Quality
skills.description: Evaluate whether output meets expectations.

skills.name: Verify Output
skills.description: Apply validation methods to confirm correctness.

skills.name: Capture Learnings
skills.description: Record insights for future improvement.

skills.name: Support Human Override
skills.description: Allow human decisions to override system gating where needed.
